signals.content_en: The US Trade Representative has initiated a Section 301 investigation into forced labor practices and proposed additional tariffs. This may affect Chinese exports of electronics and other goods to the US, increasing tariff risk and requiring enhanced supply chain due diligence.
signals.content_zh: 美国贸易代表办公室已发起强迫劳动301调查并拟加征关税，可能影响中国对美电子等产品出口，增加关税风险，需加强供应链尽职调查。

checklist.desc: Ensure products have valid FCC Part 15/18 certification for US market access.
Identify HTS codes subject to Section 301 tariffs and calculate potential cost impact.
Screen products and end-users against BIS Entity List and export control regulations.
Prepare documentation to demonstrate no forced labor in supply chain to mitigate investigation risk.
Prepare commercial invoice, packing list, contract, and export license slots for general electronics.
Run China export control and cryptography reviews for wireless/secure computing features.

signals.content_en: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and Entity List restrictions.
signals.content_zh: 应用材料公司因非法向中国出口半导体制造设备，违反BIS出口管制和实体清单限制，同意支付2.52亿美元罚款。

checklist.desc: 确认设备ECCN编码，检查是否受EAR管制，并比对实体清单和未经核实清单。
获取并审核最终用户和最终用途声明，确保不涉及军事或敏感用途。
评估设备HTS编码是否在301关税清单内，计算附加税率并准备相关文件。
如设备含无线功能，确认FCC Part 15/18认证，保留供应商FCC ID。
检查交易方是否在BIS实体清单、SDN清单等制裁名单上。

signals.content_en: The US Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related manufacturing equipment. Exporters must now demonstrate that shipments do not pose a national security risk, with increased scrutiny on end-users and end-uses. This aligns with BIS export controls and Entity List restrictions.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部修订了对华半导体出口的许可证审查政策，加强了对先进芯片及相关制造设备的管控。出口商必须证明出货不构成国家安全风险，并对最终用户和最终用途进行更严格的审查。这与BIS出口管制和实体清单限制相一致。

checklist.desc: Confirm intentional radiators, modular approvals, and supplier FCC IDs for wireless electronics before US entry.
Map the 10-digit HTS line against Section 301 lists and additional duties; document country of origin and value build-up.
Run restricted party and export control screening; retain end-user and end-use statements for controlled semiconductors.
Determine if the product falls under revised BIS controls (e.g., ECCN 3A090, 4A090) and apply for license if required.
Collect and verify end-use statements and end-user certifications to ensure no military or prohibited use.
Prepare detailed technical specifications, datasheets, and supporting documents for BIS license application.

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring common sense to export controls on civilian firearms. This change reduces licensing requirements for certain civilian firearms exports, but exporters must still comply with US export controls, including BIS regulations and entity list screening.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部撤销了拜登时期的枪支规则，恢复了对民用枪支出口管制的常识性做法。这一变化减少了某些民用枪支出口的许可要求，但出口商仍需遵守美国出口管制，包括BIS法规和实体清单筛查。

checklist.desc: 确认产品不在BIS管制清单（如ECCN 0A502）内，或已获得必要许可；进行最终用户和最终用途筛查。
对交易各方进行实体清单筛查，确保无被列入实体清单的实体参与交易。
确认产品HTS编码是否受Section 301关税影响，并计算额外关税成本。
正确归类10位HTS编码（如9303.30.0000），确保申报准确。

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce has expanded the Entity List to cover affiliates of listed entities. This means that any entity owned or controlled by a listed entity may now be subject to the same export restrictions. Exporters must conduct enhanced due diligence to identify and screen affiliates of all parties on the Entity List.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部已将实体清单扩展至涵盖被列实体的关联公司。这意味着任何由被列实体拥有或控制的实体现在可能受到相同的出口限制。出口商必须进行加强的尽职调查，以识别和筛查实体清单上所有实体的关联公司。

checklist.desc: Confirm intentional radiators, modular approvals, and supplier FCC IDs for wireless electronics before US entry.
Map the 10-digit HTS line against Section 301 lists and additional duties; document country of origin and value build-up.
Run restricted party and export control screening; retain end-user and end-use statements for controlled semiconductors.
Identify and screen all affiliates (ownership or control) of any entity on the BIS Entity List; update internal screening databases.
Obtain and retain end-user certificates and end-use statements for all shipments involving US-origin controlled items.
Determine if an export license is required based on the expanded Entity List coverage; apply for license if needed.

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce has closed a loophole allowing foreign-owned semiconductor fabs in China to bypass US export controls. This action tightens restrictions on advanced chips and equipment, requiring enhanced due diligence for US-bound exports from China.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部堵住了外国在华半导体代工厂规避美国出口管制的漏洞。此举加强了对先进芯片和设备的限制，要求对从中国出口至美国的货物进行更严格的尽职调查。

checklist.desc: Confirm intentional radiators, modular approvals, and supplier FCC IDs for wireless electronics before US entry.
Map the 10-digit HTS line against Section 301 lists and additional duties; document country of origin and value build-up.
Run restricted party and export control screening; retain end-user and end-use statements for controlled semiconductors.
Determine if the semiconductor meets parameters for advanced node (e.g., 16nm/14nm or below) subject to new restrictions.
Obtain written end-use certification from US consignee confirming no military or prohibited end-use.
Verify that the foreign-owned fab and its parent entities are not on the BIS Entity List or Military End-User List.

signals.content_en: Commerce eases export controls on Syria, reducing licensing requirements for certain items. This change may affect US export controls and entity list screening for Syria-bound shipments.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部放宽对叙利亚的出口管制，降低部分物项的许可要求。此变更可能影响对叙利亚出口的美国出口管制和实体清单筛查。

checklist.desc: Confirm intentional radiators, modular approvals, and supplier FCC IDs for wireless electronics before US entry.
Map the 10-digit HTS line against Section 301 lists and additional duties; document country of origin and value build-up.
Run restricted party and export control screening; retain end-user and end-use statements for controlled semiconductors.
